<noinclude>
Usage:
<pre>
{{Card
| name      = Ratchanter
| type      = Minion
| element   = Dark
| tribe     = Rat
| cost      = 4
| attack    = 15
| hp        = 30
| range     = 0
| rules     = Activated: pay 2 mana to conjure a Common Rat and buff it.
| flavor    = The rats listen, and the rats remember.
| keywords  = Sacrifice, Summon
| art       = Ratchanter.png
| patch     = 0.4.2
| stable_id = ratchanter
| deckable  = true
}}
</pre>

This template renders a card infobox AND emits SMW property annotations in a
single pass. Vintage re-theme 2026-07-11 (user: "metadata section on wiki for
cards is still themed on the old blue version") — parchment/bronze/gold chrome
matching the game client; type coding per the approved card frame redesign
(Minion gold, Magic indigo, React amber). Driven by sync_cards.py from
data/cards/*.json.
</noinclude><includeonly>{| class="gt-card gt-element-{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}" style="float:right; width:300px; border:1px solid #6b5730; border-radius:10px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#201709,#171006); color:#cbb98f; font-family:'Alegreya',Georgia,serif; margin:0 0 1em 1em; box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 10px 30px -14px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); overflow:hidden;"
|-
! colspan="3" style="padding:10px 60px; background:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type|}}}}}|minion=linear-gradient(180deg,#b98a3c,#8a6423)|magic=linear-gradient(180deg,#4a4685,#333060)|react=linear-gradient(180deg,#c2731f,#8f5417)|#default=linear-gradient(180deg,#3d2f15,#241a0a)}}; border-bottom:1px solid #6b5730; text-align:center; position:relative; line-height:1.15;" | <span style="position:absolute; left:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffd873,#e0a23c); border-radius:50%; width:36px; height:36px; border:1px solid #3a2e18; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#201709; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-weight:700; font-size:16px;">{{{cost|?}}}</span><span style="font-size:1.05em; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.04em; color:#f7f1de; text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.75); display:block; word-break:break-word;">{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</span><span style="position:absolute; right:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); background:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}|wood=rgb(102,187,106)|fire=rgb(220,40,30)|earth=rgb(140,100,40)|water=rgb(25,118,210)|metal=rgb(150,150,165)|dark=rgb(130,50,180)|light=rgb(216,196,40)|#default=rgb(128,128,128)}}; border-radius:50%; width:36px; height:36px; border:1px solid #3a2e18; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#fff; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-weight:700; font-size:9px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.45) inset;">{{{element|?}}}</span>
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:0;" | [[File:{{{art|CardBack.png}}}|300px|center|link=]]
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:6px 12px; background:#241a0a; border-top:1px solid #3a2e18;" | <span style="color:#9a865c; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.18em; text-transform:uppercase;">Type</span> <span style="float:right; color:#e8dcbe;">[[{{{type|Minion}}}]]</span>
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:6px 12px; background:#1d1408; border-top:1px solid #3a2e18;" | <span style="color:#9a865c; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.18em; text-transform:uppercase;">Element</span> <span style="float:right; color:#e8dcbe;">[[{{{element|Neutral}}}]]</span>
{{{meta_rows|}}}
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:10px 12px; min-height:60px; background:rgba(20,14,6,0.8); border-top:1px dashed #6b5730; font-family:'Alegreya',Georgia,serif; font-size:13.5px; line-height:1.5; color:#e8dcbe;" | {{{rules|}}}{{#if:{{{flavor|}}}|<hr style="border:0;border-top:1px dashed #6b5730; margin:8px 0;"/><span style="color:#9a865c; font-style:italic; font-size:12px;">{{{flavor}}}</span>}}
|-
{{#if:{{{attack|}}}|
{{!}} style="padding:8px 12px; background:#241a0a; text-align:left; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-weight:700; font-size:18px; color:#d8695a; border-top:1px solid #6b5730;" {{!}} {{{attack}}}🗡️
{{!}} style="padding:8px 12px; background:#241a0a; text-align:center; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-weight:700; font-size:10px; color:#9a865c; letter-spacing:0.18em; text-transform:uppercase; border-top:1px solid #6b5730;" {{!}} {{#if:{{{range|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{range}}}|0|MELEE|RANGE {{{range}}}}}}}
{{!}} style="padding:8px 12px; background:#241a0a; text-align:right; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-weight:700; font-size:18px; color:#9bb85a; border-top:1px solid #6b5730;" {{!}} {{{hp}}}🤍
}}
{{#if:{{{react_rules|}}}|
{{!}}-
! colspan="3" style="padding:7px 12px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#c2731f,#8f5417); text-align:left; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-weight:700; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#fff7e6; border-top:1px solid #6b5730; position:relative;" {{!}} REACT{{#if:{{{react_cost|}}}|<span style="position:absolute; right:8px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffd873,#e0a23c); border-radius:50%; width:22px; height:22px; border:1px solid #3a2e18; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#201709; font-family:'Alegreya SC',serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0;">{{{react_cost}}}</span>}}
{{!}}-
{{!}} colspan="3" style="padding:8px 12px; background:rgba(194,115,31,0.14); border:1px solid rgba(194,115,31,0.45); font-family:'Alegreya',Georgia,serif; font-size:13px; line-height:1.5; color:#e8dcbe;" {{!}} {{{react_rules}}}
}}
{{!}}}


{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#set:Name={{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{stable_id|}}}|{{#set:StableId={{{stable_id}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#set:CardType={{{type}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{element|}}}|{{#set:Element={{{element}}} }}}}{{{tribe_annotations|}}}{{#if:{{{cost|}}}|{{#set:ManaCost={{{cost}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{attack|}}}|{{#set:Attack={{{attack}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{hp|}}}|{{#set:HP={{{hp}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{range|}}}|{{#set:Range={{{range}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{art|}}}|{{#set:ArtFile=File:{{{art}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{patch|}}}|{{#set:FirstPatch={{{patch}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{last_changed_patch|}}}|{{#set:LastChangedPatch={{{last_changed_patch}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{deckable|}}}|{{#set:Deckable={{{deckable}}} }}}}{{{keyword_annotations|}}}{{#set:LastModified={{CURRENTTIMESTAMP}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{deprecated|}}}|1|[[Category:Deprecated]]|[[Category:Card]]}}{{#if:{{{element|}}}|[[Category:{{{element}}} cards]]}}{{#if:{{{type|}}}|[[Category:{{{type}}}s]]}}</includeonly>
